column1: # Partition table for 16 MB flash (Waveshare ESP32-S3-Touch-LCD-1.47)
#   0x00A1_0000 – 0x00FF_FFFF  spiffs      ( 5 MB + 960 KB freeish buffer area)
# app0 at 5 MB gives plenty of room for Bluedroid + TinyUSB + Arduino_GFX
# + the sniffer code (~2.5–3 MB typical).  OTA is optional but costs nothing.
